title: lathyrus montanus lusus albiflorus
side_effects: Lathyrus montanus lusus albiflorus can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing neurological damage, muscle weakness, and a range of other health problems due to the presence of neurolathyrism-inducing compounds. Consuming excessive amounts of the plant can lead to symptoms like tremors, paralysis, and even long-term disability. Prolonged exposure to these compounds has also been linked to an increased risk of cardiovascular disease and impaired cognitive function. In extreme cases, improper use of Lathyrus montanus lusus albiflorus can result in permanent damage and reduced life expectancy.
